name: Outplay Entertainment
short_description: Outplay Entertainment is an award-winning game developer focused on building and operating high-quality mobile games in close partnership with leading publishers and IP holders
about: Outplay Entertainment is an award-winning game developer focused on building and operating high-quality mobile games in close partnership with leading publishers and IP holders. Outplay has created a portfolio of successful critically acclaimed casual titles under the Outplay and Bite Size Games brands, in addition to those produced in collaboration with other leading publishers.
